final_decision.customer_message: Thank you for your loyalty, Maria! We’re preparing your order and two of your favorites (Ibuprofen and Allergy Relief) are ready for pickup now at store-101. Vitamin D3 is temporarily out of stock, but a new shipment will arrive on February 26th—we’ll notify you as soon as it’s available. Please note: Ibuprofen may interact with your blood pressure medication (Lisinopril), so a pharmacist will discuss this before pickup. You also have upcoming clinic visits for your flu shot (March 1) and blood pressure check (March 8). If you need recommendations or have questions, our pharmacy and wellness teams are ready to help!
